stories.title: Vrabel to seek counseling, miss Day 3 of draft
stories.summary: Patriots coach Mike Vrabel won't be with the team for the third day of the NFL draft Saturday, as he plans to be with his family this weekend outside of Massachusetts.

stories.title: OKC takes 2-0 lead but loses Williams to injury
stories.summary: Thunder star Jalen Williams grabbed his left hamstring after missing a contested layup and left the court in the third quarter of Wednesday's Game 2 win over the Suns.

stories.title: Booker, Brooks rip refs after Suns' loss: 'Terrible'
stories.summary: Suns star Devin Booker called crew chief James Williams out by name while saying Wednesday's officiating was "bad for the integrity of the sport."

stories.title: Pens on brink, sound off on game-changing melee
stories.summary: A scrum that saw all 10 skaters in their respective penalty boxes helped the Flyers to a 5-2 win on Wednesday and drew the ire of the Penguins, who now find themselves in a 3-0 series hole.

stories.title: Frustrated Phillies drop 8th straight: 'It sucks'
stories.summary: The Phillies lost their eighth consecutive game, 7-2 to the Cubs on Wednesday night, for their longest losing streak since 2018.
